image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about white blood cells.
Context visual: These tiny warriors of your body fight off infections and diseases, but there's more to the story.
Escalation visual: Did you know there are different types? Neutrophils, lymphocytes, monocytes—they all have unique missions.
Evidence visual: Research shows they adapt to threats, even learning from past infections. Imagine that!
Pattern Interrupt visual: But not everything is perfect. Sometimes, these cells can mistakenly attack healthy tissues.
Payoff visual: So, white blood cells are both protectors and potential troublemakers in our immune system.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the science? Hit subscribe for more amazing facts!
